subject: Lane B — Verification
description:
Lane B — Verification

Own independent verification and red-team review. First inspect the contract, schemas, selector/enqueue call sites, and existing tests without editing delivery-owned files. Monitor Lane A completion/state, then test the final shared worktree behavior: precedence, S3 HTTP extraction, local-path rejection (Windows/Unix/file), missing eventId/source, non-clips CLIP rejection, dedupe tuple, media verifier false/error behavior, and primary alert side-channel isolation. Add tests only in a clearly separate test file if needed and announce overlap before editing; otherwise report blockers and exact Gradle commands/evidence. Run git diff --check at terminal verification.
title: Lane B — Verification
objective:
Lane B — Verification

Own independent verification and red-team review. First inspect the contract, schemas, selector/enqueue call sites, and existing tests without editing delivery-owned files. Monitor Lane A completion/state, then test the final shared worktree behavior: precedence, S3 HTTP extraction, local-path rejection (Windows/Unix/file), missing eventId/source, non-clips CLIP rejection, dedupe tuple, media verifier false/error behavior, and primary alert side-channel isolation. Add tests only in a clearly separate test file if needed and announce overlap before editing; otherwise report blockers and exact Gradle commands/evidence. Run git diff --check at terminal verification.

completion_evidence.summary: Independent contract verification passed focused tests and diff hygiene; a transactional isolation blocker was escalated.

items.summary: Six focused VLM, alert, and event test classes passed independently.
items.command: PowerShell with CI removed: gradlew.bat --no-daemon test --tests <six focused classes>

items.summary: REQUIRED VLM enqueue can mark the primary alert transaction rollback-only on repository/JPA failure despite catch.

completion_evidence.notes: Verified precedence, S3 HTTP extraction, local-path rejection, missing event/source, clips prefix, dedupe tuple, verifier false/error, DTO propagation, and mocked call-site isolation. True persistence isolation remains unsafe and was reported to worker-1 and leader-fixed.
